claim_boundary: Ticket 76 proves a bounded symbolic recurrence audit but does not solve any open problem.

attempts.attempt: Transfer only the TICKET76 requirement that a state quotient must have an exact successor formula and account for information lost by normalization. No Collatz arithmetic or counts are transferred.

bounded_result.candidate_theorem: An actual-zeta explicit-formula state has a uniform all-height successor bound with no hidden tail information loss.

attempts.obstruction: No problem-specific symbolic recurrence computation was performed for this problem.

attempts.claim_boundary: No riemann proof and no certified riemann counterexample.

attempts.proof_or_counterexample_mode: exact symbolic identity plus reachable fixed-precision counteredges
attempts.attempt: Derive the exact four-bit boundary recurrence, verify it on every fifth- and sixth-layer child, and test whether a fixed number of boundary-quotient bits is recursively sufficient.

symbolic_objects.precision_loss: A_next mod 2^q generally requires A mod 2^(q+4), so a fixed q-bit quotient projection is not algebraically successor-closed without extra restrictions.

symbolic_boundary_recurrence_audit.bounded_lemma: The four-bit first-boundary valuation formula holds on every audited fifth- and sixth-layer child. For each tested precision q, observed unresolved branches contain exact witnesses showing that q quotient bits do not determine the next q quotient bits, while q+4 lookahead bits do.
symbolic_boundary_recurrence_audit.discarded_route: Repair TICKET75 by appending a fixed number q of low boundary-quotient bits. The exact unresolved recurrence divides by 16 and exposes four previously unseen bits; observed reachable witnesses collide at every tested q.
symbolic_boundary_recurrence_audit.retained_route: Treat the full boundary quotient as a 2-adic transducer state and search for a separate well-founded arithmetic rank, or prove that reachable states satisfy an additional restriction that makes a finite quotient closed.
symbolic_boundary_recurrence_audit.candidate_theorem: ReachableBoundaryRestrictionOrTwoAdicPressurePath: reachable Collatz boundary quotients obey a uniform arithmetic restriction yielding finite successor closure and strict descent, or their exact 2-adic recurrence admits an all-depth compatible pressure path requiring separate dynamical classification.
symbolic_boundary_recurrence_audit.proof_boundary: TICKET76 proves an exact recurrence identity and bounded collision statements for the audited rows. It does not prove Collatz, construct a divergent integer orbit, or exclude every possible infinite-state rank.

attempts.obstruction: An unresolved four-bit lift divides its boundary quotient by 16 after an affine odd correction, exposing four higher bits that no fixed low-bit projection carries.
attempts.candidate_theorem: ReachableBoundaryRestrictionOrTwoAdicPressurePath: reachable Collatz boundary quotients obey a uniform arithmetic restriction yielding finite successor closure and strict descent, or their exact 2-adic recurrence admits an all-depth compatible pressure path requiring separate dynamical classification.
attempts.next_experiment: Characterize restrictions on reachable boundary quotients or construct an exact all-depth 2-adic pressure path.
